system.powerDescription:
Once per scene, you coat the skin of a willing creautre within range with a thin, shifting layer of metal. Their skin becomes incredibly difficult to penetrate and resistant to harm, with this layer able to take 1+CAT slashes of physical harm before breaking. In addition, their mundane strength raises to 1/2 CAT and they may choose to have their size rise to 1/2 CAT as well. When this metal breaks, the effect immediately ends. 

Gain or grant +1D when you or an ally next take advantage of this power. This power may alter the parameters of a roll whilst active.
